steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the phrase “created to [verb] exceptional folk and traditional artists,” where recipients are “chosen for his lifetime contributions to the arts”—this points to recognition as the fellowship's purpose.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Honor” means to show respect and recognition, matching the fellowship's purpose exactly. “Begin” lacks purpose, “overshadow” diminishes prominence, and “distract” redirects attention—none convey recognition. That matches choice D — D is correct.
